# `api.jobs.shipment.get_origin_destination`

> `GET /job/{jobDisplayId}/shipment/origindestination` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.jobs.shipment.get_origin_destination(job_display_id: int) -> ShipmentOriginDestination
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab jobs shipment get_origin_destination <job_display_id>
```

``GET /job/{jobDisplayId}/shipment/origindestination``

## Response

Returns `ShipmentOriginDestination`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `origin` | `Optional[dict]` | no | Origin address details |
| `destination` | `Optional[dict]` | no | Destination address details |
